news.headline: Eggland's Best partners with Jessie James Decker, offering a $5,000 prize, to spread holiday cheer with festive recipes.
news.summary: Get in the holiday spirit and participate for an opportunity to win a prize of $5,000 to add some excitement to your celebrations! Located in CEDAR KNOLLS, N.J., the event is set to take place on December 2, 2024. Prepare to decorate your home and indulge in delicious holiday recipes! Eggland's Best has joined forces with a well-known singer, songwriter, and cookbook author for this festive initiative.

news.headline: MARA Holdings mined 907 Bitcoin in November, up 26% from the previous month. Total mined this year is 8,563 BTC.
news.summary: Shares of MARA Holdings Inc (NASDAQ: MARA) were volatile in early trading. The company shared its Bitcoin mining update for November, revealing that it mined 907 Bitcoin during the month, marking a 26% increase from the previous month. In total, MARA Holdings has mined 8,563 Bitcoin since the beginning of the year. Additionally, the company reported a 15% month-over-month growth in its energized hash rate, which now stands at 46.1 EH/s. MARA described November as a record-breaking month for the company. This news comes alongside an announcement of a proposed private offering.

news.headline: Barnier's French budget move threatens government stability, risking collapse.
Carlisle Fluid Technologies acquires Reinhardt Technik to boost sealants and adhesives technology offerings.
news.summary: In Oakdale, Minnesota on December 2, 2024, Carlisle Fluid Technologies, a top manufacturer of products and systems for spray material supply, application, and curing, has successfully acquired Reinhardt. This acquisition holds significance in the industry, as Carlisle Fluid Technologies is renowned for its global presence and expertise in products related to paints, coatings, powders, sealants, and adhesives. This strategic move is anticipated to enhance Carlisle's market position and offerings, consolidating its foothold in the sector.

news.headline: Citi’s Kaiser forecasts jobs boost to drive equities up by year end.  #Economy #StockMarket
Datasea hosts promotion event, signs sales agreement for 300,000 acoustic units, expected to generate $20.8M annually.
news.summary: Datasea Inc. (Nasdaq: DTSS), a digital technology company based in Nevada, announced an agreement on December 2, 2024, which is projected to bring in around $20.8 million per year. The agreement underscores their focus on advancements in acoustic high-tech and 5G AI multimodal digital technologies.

news.headline: Heritage Environmental Services appoints Rachel Evans as Chief Human Resources Officer, adding 28 years of experience.
news.summary: Indianapolis-based company, Heritage Environmental Services (HES), part of EQT Infrastructure, has recently appointed Rachel Evans as its Chief Human Resources Officer. Evans, with more than 28 years of experience, assumed the role on December 2, 2024. This move reflects HES's commitment to strengthening its leadership team.

news.headline: US S&P Manufacturing PMI Final Actual 49.7 (Forecast 48.8, Previous 48.8)
CVS Health Corp starts cash tender offers for selected notes; includes 4.100% Senior Notes due 2025.
news.summary: CVS Health Corporation, based in Woonsocket, R.I., revealed on December 2, 2024, that it has initiated cash tender offers for its 4.100% Senior Notes due 2025. The company, listed on NYSE as CVS, has kicked off the Tender Offers for all of these notes. This move is a part of their strategy to manage their debt obligations.

news.headline: French Leftwing Leader Panot: We will lodge motion of no-confidence against government.
H. J. Russell & Company pioneers modular construction for aviation industry, making history in North America.
news.summary: H. J. Russell & Company of Atlanta has achieved a significant milestone in North American aviation infrastructure by becoming the first firm to pioneer the use of modular construction techniques in the roles of Project Management (PM), Construction Management (CM), and Construction Manager at Risk (CMaR).

news.headline: French PM Barnier: All actors must now live up to their responsibilities, i will live up to mine.
French PM Barnier: I have decided to use special constitutional powers to push through social security bill without vote.
IDEX Biometrics ASA reports final results of Subsequent Offering. Details unavailable due to distribution restrictions.
news.summary: This information is confidential and should not be shared, published, or distributed in Australia, Canada, Japan, Hong Kong, the United States, or any other jurisdiction where it may be unlawful. This announcement does not serve as an offer for any of the securities mentioned.

news.headline: CHIPS network sets new record on Black Friday with 1,083,550 payments totaling $2.63 trillion.
news.summary: In a recent report from December 2, 2024, it was revealed that CHIPS successfully processed and finalized a total of 1,083,550 transactions, amounting to an impressive value of $2.63 trillion. This achievement marks a new milestone in their operations, setting a record for the highest daily transaction volume to date. The CHIPS network, recognized as the leading private-sector platform for high-value clearing and settlement globally, is overseen by The Clearing House.

news.headline: Red Hat Ansible Automation Platform named infrastructure automation leader by Forrester Research in Q4 2024.
news.summary: In Raleigh, N.C., Red Hat, Inc., a prominent provider of open source solutions, declared that Red Hat Ansible Automation Platform has secured the top position in The Forrester Wave™: Infrastructure Automation Platforms, Q4 2024. Forrester Research, a leading market research firm, assessed major infrastructure automation platform providers, evaluating and ranking them based on various criteria. Red Hat, along with ten other top companies, underwent thorough analysis to determine their performance and offerings in this sector.

news.headline: French PM Barnier: We face a moment of truth.
Ethan Allen celebrates two successful years serving Syracuse. Jared Roth, owner, credits the beautiful studio for the success.
news.summary: Syracuse, New York - On December 2, 2024, Ethan Allen marks two years of operation in Syracuse and nearby areas, located at a studio in Marshall's Plaza off Erie Boulevard. Jared Roth, the third-generation owner of R & G Furniture operating as Ethan Allen, expresses satisfaction with the studio's successful service to the community.

news.headline: Integrated Wellness Acquisition Corp. and Btab Ecommerce Group, Inc. file draft registration statement Form S-4 with SEC.
news.summary: Integrated Wellness Acquisition Corp. and Btab Ecommerce Group, Inc. have made an announcement regarding the submission of a draft registration statement on Form S-4 to the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). This filing marks a significant step in their merger process. The statement includes essential details about the merger, financial information, and other pertinent data. This move indicates progress towards the anticipated merger between the two companies. The submission of the Form S-4 signals the beginning of the review process by the SEC, leading both companies closer to finalizing this strategic business combination.

news.headline: French PM Barnier: France must have a budget for 2025.
Online event "Data Integrity by Design" on Dec 9-10, 2024 for FDA-regulated industries about modernizing compliance processes.
news.summary: A new training session titled "All About Data Integrity by Design" has recently been included in the catalog of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The webinar is tailored for professionals engaged in organizing, implementing, and aiding computer system validation undertakings within FDA-regulated sectors like pharmaceuticals, medical devices, biologics, and tobacco products. This educational opportunity caters specifically to individuals involved in research and development. The training aims to equip participants with relevant knowledge and skills for ensuring data integrity in their respective industries.

news.headline: John Hancock offers Apple Watch Series 10 to eligible life insurance customers in Vitality Program.
news.summary: In Boston on November 21, 2024, John Hancock revealed its decision to provide the newest Apple Watch editions to qualifying life insurance clients enrolled in the John Hancock Vitality Program. This program recognizes and incentivizes customers for their daily efforts to lead healthier, longer lives.

news.headline: BluSky Carbon Inc. is offering 6,000,000 units at $0.50 each, with a total of $3 million up for grabs in the public offering.
news.summary: BluSky Carbon Inc., based in Old Saybrook, Conn. and Vancouver, British Columbia, made an announcement on Dec. 02, 2024, revealing their engagement with Canaccord Genuity Corp. for a public offering of up to 6,000,000 units at $0.50 per Unit. This offering is expected to generate gross proceeds amounting to $3,000,000. Canaccord Genuity Corp. will lead this offering on a "best-efforts" marketed basis. The closing of this Offering is slated for on or about December 19, 2024, subject to potential changes agreed upon between the two parties.

news.headline: Executive Pat Gelsinger departs Intel, stepping down as Chief, according to latest reports.
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that approximately 300 employees will be laid off by a major technology company in an effort to streamline operations and cut costs. This decision comes as the company faces financial challenges due to a decrease in revenue and increased competition. The layoffs are expected to affect various departments within the organization and will result in an estimated savings of $10 million annually. The company stated that impacted employees will be offered severance packages and career counseling to assist with the transition. This move is part of a larger restructuring initiative aimed at positioning the company for future growth and profitability.

news.headline: Leader of French Socialists Olivier Faure: We will vote against PM Barnier in case of no-confidence vote.
JLL and HJ Sims secure $473M financing for 350-bed senior housing rental development in Irvine, California.
news.summary: A new luxury rental community called The James will be constructed in Irvine, California, equipped with 350 beds for Independent Living, Assisted Living, and Memory Care. The project was announced on December 2, 2024, in Newport Beach, California. JLL's Capital Markets group and HJ Sims revealed that they have successfully secured $473 million in tax financing for the development.

news.headline: Xcel Energy offers to purchase $110,000,000 in bonds issued by Northern States Power Company in Minnesota.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Xcel Energy Inc. (NASDAQ: XEL) revealed its initiation of cash purchase offers (Tender Offers) for up to $110,000,000 in aggregate principal amount (Aggregate Tender Cap) of their first mortgage bonds.

news.headline: Princess Cruises offers 2026-2027 sailings from West Coast to Mexico, Hawaii, & California. Includes new Star Princess sailing in April 2027.
news.summary: A top cruise line based on the West Coast will be launching voyages from Los Angeles, San Francisco, and Vancouver, B.C. The brand-new Star Princess ship is set to embark on a Mexican Riviera cruise from Los Angeles in April 2027. This announcement was made from Fort Lauderdale, Florida on December 2, 2024. Travelers can look forward to exploring sun-drenched Mexican beaches and picturesque volcanic landscapes on this upcoming voyage.

news.headline: New BRIEF2A is the Gold-Standard in Adult Executive Function Assessment, the second edition with advanced features.
news.summary: In Lutz, Florida on December 2, 2024, PAR, Inc., a reputable publisher of psychological assessments, introduced the BRIEF2A (Behavior Rating Inventory of Executive Function, Second Edition—Adult Version). This latest version of the tool showcases updated features and improvements, establishing it as a cutting-edge resource in the field of psychological assessments.

news.headline: Ampersand Capital Partners acquires Nektar Therapeutics' PEG Reagent Manufacturing Business, forming Gannet BioChem. Acquisition completed on Dec. 2, 2024.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, private equity firm Ampersand Capital Partners, known for making growth equity investments in life sciences and healthcare, finalized its acquisition of Nektar. The deal, which had been previously disclosed, has now successfully concluded. This acquisition marks a significant development in the industry and demonstrates Ampersand's commitment to investing in this sector.

news.headline: Red Oak Recovery to host expert speaker addressing PTSD treatment post-Hurricane Helene. Important for local clinicians and community mental health.
news.summary: An addiction and mental health treatment center near Asheville, Red Oak Recovery, will have a distinguished speaker to discuss the difficulties local clinicians encounter in aiding individuals battling PTSD and other mental health issues after natural disasters like Hurricane Helene. Mick Masterson highlights the profound impact of Hurricane Helene on the community's mental health.

news.headline: Elektrobit launches EB corbos Linux SDK on AWS for cloud-based development, promoting open source benefits.
news.summary: Developers are now able to take advantage of open source with the opportunity for virtual development using the Software Development Kit (SDK) to speed up the transformation to Software Defined Vehicles (SDV). Additionally, the associated product EB corbos AdaptiveCore can now be found on the AWS Marketplace. EB corbos Linux for Safety Applications is set to be released shortly after. The developments are from ERLANGEN, Germany.

news.headline: Fiserv Small Business Index® for November 2024: Restaurant Sales Jump, Retail Steadies with over 9% growth in foot-traffic.
news.summary: Fiserv, Inc., a prominent global provider of payments and financial services technology traded under NYSE: FI, has recently released the Fiserv Small Business Index for November 2024. Jennifer LaClair, the Head of Merchant Solutions at Fiserv, commented that the index indicated robust consumer spending in November. The data reflects a healthy growth in year-over-year sales and over 9% increase in foot-traffic, signaling positive trends amidst the 2024 holiday season.

news.headline: Exact Sciences Corp. and Lil Jon collaborate on "Get Low #2" campaign to promote colon cancer screening, highlighting Cologuard® test for adults 45+, targeting nation's #2 cancer killer.
news.summary: In MADISON, Wisconsin, Exact Sciences Corp., a prominent provider of cancer screening and diagnostic tests, has partnered with Lil Jon, a multi-platinum, Grammy award-winning artist, for the “Get Low #2” campaign aimed at boosting screening for colon cancer – the second leading cause of cancer-related deaths in the US. This collaboration also promotes the Cologuard® test as a reliable and non-invasive method to enhance screening rates among eligible adults aged 45 and above. The Cologuard test, which is stool-based, offers a solution to overcome certain screening barriers.

news.headline: Dr. Réjean Boivin appointed as editor-in-chief for Review of Scientific Instruments by AIP Publishing.
news.summary: In Melville, New York, on December 2, 2024, AIP Publishing proudly introduced Dr. Réjean Boivin as the latest editor-in-chief of Review of Scientific Instruments. Dr. Boivin, previously the Director of the Center of Excellence for Advanced Diagnostics at General Atomics, brings a wealth of experience and expertise to his new role.

news.headline: Grasons Estate Sales provides transition assistance, aiding families and businesses in closing chapters.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Scottsdale, Arizona, Grasons, a prominent provider of estate sale and business liquidation services and part of Evive Brands, emphasizes the significance of estate sales as the end of the year nears. This process aids individuals and businesses in wrapping up one chapter and getting ready for new beginnings.

news.headline: ARC and ANA partner for modern distribution, enhancing retailing; announced on Dec. 2, 2024. #AVnews.
news.summary: All Nippon Airways (ANA) has improved its retailing capabilities by partnering with Airlines Reporting Corp. (ARC), a prominent provider of data, financial services, and modern distribution solutions. This collaboration was disclosed on December 2, 2024, in Arlington, Virginia. The partnership aims to enhance ANA's distribution operations and offer customers a seamless experience. Through this venture, ANA intends to leverage ARC's expertise to boost its retail services and strengthen its market presence.

news.headline: H2O Innovation and partners introduce Mega-Vessel Membrane System, a game changer in desalination. Global exclusive license granted.
news.summary: Quebec City - H2O Innovation Inc. has recently secured an exclusive agreement with MegaVessels Water Inc. and Harbin ROPV Industrial Co., Ltd. The agreement grants H2O Innovation the exclusive license for manufacturing and selling the Mega-Vessel Membrane System designed for Reverse Osmosis (RO) applications globally. This innovative technology is a significant advancement in desalination, benefitting from various key factors which position it as a breakthrough in the field.

news.headline: Canadian Manufacturing PMI Actual 52.0 (Forecast -, Previous 51.1)
MOO Imbalance
Diana Shipping Inc. signs a time charter contract with Bunge for m/v DSI Aquarius at $13,300/day for 10-12 months.
news.summary: Athens, Greece, December 2, 2024 - Diana Shipping Inc. (NYSE: DSX), a prominent global shipping company focusing on owning and chartering dry bulk vessels, revealed that a subsidiary recently secured a time charter deal with Bunge SA, Geneva. The agreement involves one of its Ultramax dry bulk vessels, the m/v DSI Aquarius, at a gross charter rate of US$13,300 per day. After deducting a 5.00% commission for third parties, this charter will last for a minimum of ten months up to about twelve months, starting from December 6, 2024.

news.headline: Curinos' Amplero AI wins Gold at MarCom Awards for 2024 campaign, aiding in highly personalized content delivery.
news.summary: Curinos, a worldwide data intelligence company specializing in providing exclusive expertise, insights, and analytics to top financial institutions, has been honored with a prestigious MarCom 2024 Gold award for its cutting-edge AI-driven product, Amplero Personalization Optimizer. This recognition underscores the effectiveness of Amplero's innovative AI technology in enabling Synovus Bank, a major player in financial services, to deliver bespoke content tailored to individual client behaviors and preferences.

news.headline: VW union members at 9 German plants stage short strikes, warning of more if demands aren't met.
news.summary: Employees at nine automobile manufacturing plants in Germany went on strike, temporarily halting production. They have given a warning that they will intensify the protest if their requests are not addressed.

news.headline: infinitii ai reports 35% revenue growth in Q1 FY2025, reaching $718,680 and doubling FY2024's growth rate. Operational loss reduced by 62% to $95,932 with improved cash flow management. CEO highlights sales strategy to engage wider network for growth.
news.summary: Infinitii ai reported strong financial results for the period ended September 30, 2024. The company achieved $718,680 in revenue for Q1 FY2025, a 35% increase from the previous year's $534,144. The quarterly loss from operations decreased by 62% to $95,932 compared to $251,695 in Q1 FY2024, showing improved profitability. Cash required for operating activities also decreased by 8% to $302,873. CEO Jean Charles Phaneuf attributed the success to a sales strategy that involves engaging with a wider network of firms and offering new machine learning software for real-time predictive insights. These numbers reflect the company's strong operational efficiency and accelerating growth trajectory.

news.headline: Bank of Nova Scotia set to reveal quarterly earnings with expected EPS of $1.19, investors await positive guidance.
news.summary: Bank of Nova Scotia (NYSE:BNS) is preparing to reveal its quarterly financial results on Tuesday, December 3, 2024. Analysts predict that the company will report an earnings per share (EPS) of $1.19. Investors will be eager to see if Bank of Nova Scotia surpasses this estimate and provides optimistic guidance for future growth. More details can be found on the Benzinga website.

news.headline: Okta sets to report $0.58 EPS on 2024-12-03, with past volatility after beating estimates, trading at $77.56 per share.
news.summary: Okta (NASDAQ:OKTA) is set to report its quarterly earnings on 2024-12-03, with analysts estimating an EPS of $0.58. Investors are eager to hear about surpassing estimates and positive guidance for the next quarter. In the previous quarter, Okta beat EPS by $0.11, leading to a 17.64% drop in share price the next day. The stock was trading at $77.56 on November 29, with a 6.7% increase over the last 52 weeks. Analysts rate Okta as Neutral based on 17 ratings. Understanding market sentiments and expectations is crucial for investors. Full story available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Bank of Nova Scotia to release earnings report on 2024-12-03. Analysts predict EPS of $1.19. Bulls optimistic for positive guidance.
news.summary: On Tuesday, December 3, 2024, Bank of Nova Scotia (NYSE:BNS) is set to report its quarterly earnings. Analysts predict an earnings per share (EPS) of $1.19 for the company. Investors will be eager to see if Bank of Nova Scotia surpasses this estimate and provides optimistic guidance for the following quarter. Positive news could boost investor confidence in the company's performance moving forward. Stay tuned for the detailed report on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Descartes Systems Gr to reveal earnings on 12/3, with predicted EPS of $0.40. Investors hopeful for positive results.
news.summary: Descartes Systems Gr, listed on NASDAQ as DSGX, is scheduled to reveal its quarterly financial results on Tuesday, December 3, 2024. Analysts predict the company will post an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.40. Stakeholders are anticipating this announcement, optimistic for potential results exceeding expectations and optimistic guidance for the following quarter. The full article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Box (NYSE: BOX) to report earnings on 2024-12-03. Analysts predict EPS of $0.42. Investors hoping for positive guidance.
news.summary: Box (NYSE:BOX) is set to unveil its quarterly earnings on Tuesday, December 3, 2024. Analysts project an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.42. Investors are optimistic that Box will surpass this estimate and possibly offer upbeat guidance for future growth. For more detailed information, the full story can be found on the Benzinga website.

news.headline: Pure Storage to report Q3 earnings on 2024-12-03 with anticipated EPS of $0.42. Stock at $52.99, up 62.6% in 52 weeks. Analysts bullish with Buy rating & $75.33 target. EPS past performances detailed.
news.summary: Pure Storage (NYSE:PSTG) is set to report its quarterly earnings on December 3, 2024. Analysts expect an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.42. In the previous quarter, Pure Storage exceeded expectations by $0.07, leading to a 15.8% drop in share price the next day. Looking at historical performance, in Q2 2025 they beat EPS by 16% with a resulting drop of 16% in the stock price, while in Q4 2024 they beat EPS by 25% with a 25% increase in stock price. As of November 29, shares were trading at $52.99, up 62.6% over the last 52 weeks. Analyst consensus for Pure Storage is a Buy rating with an average one-year price target of $75.33, implying a potential 42.16% upside. Market sentiment and future projections heavily influence stock prices for this tech company.
